milestone_name: Gateway Program Authorization and Formulation
notes: NASA Authorization Act of 2017 and Space Policy Directive 1 (December 2017) directed NASA to develop a lunar orbital platform. Program formulation begins.

milestone_name: Gateway System Requirements Review (SRR)
notes: Top-level system requirements reviewed and approved; first formal technical review for the Gateway program establishing Level 1 and Level 2 requirements baseline.

milestone_name: PPE Contract Award - Maxar Technologies $375M FFP
notes: NASA selected Maxar Technologies for PPE development under $375M firm-fixed-price contract. First major contract award for Gateway hardware. Source: NASA press release May 23 2019.

milestone_name: Gateway System Definition Review (SDR)
notes: System-level design reference mission confirmed; architecture baseline established; SDR closes formulation phase and opens preliminary design cycle.

milestone_name: HALO Phase A-B Contract Award - Northrop Grumman $187M
notes: Northrop Grumman Innovation Systems awarded $187M for HALO preliminary design phase. Source: NASA press release June 5 2020.

milestone_name: SpaceX Falcon Heavy Launch Services Contract Award $331.8M
notes: NASA awarded $331.8M firm-fixed-price contract to SpaceX for Falcon Heavy Block 5 Expendable launch of PPE-HALO stack. Source: NASA press release February 9 2021.

milestone_name: HALO Fabrication and Integration Contract Award $935M
notes: NASA finalized $935M contract with Northrop Grumman for HALO fabrication and PPE-HALO integration at NGIS Gilbert AZ. Source: NASA press release July 9 2021.

milestone_name: Non-Advocate Review (NAR) Pre-PCA Complete
notes: Aerospace Corporation completes Non-Advocate Review validating Gateway program cost schedule and technical readiness for Program Commitment Agreement. Key gate before PCA.

milestone_name: Program Commitment Agreement (PCA) Baseline Approval
notes: NASA Associate Administrator for Exploration Systems Development approves Gateway PCA; cost schedule and technical baselines officially established. Lifecycle cost baseline ~$6.8B FY2020-FY2033.

milestone_name: PPE Critical Design Review (CDR) Complete
notes: Maxar Technologies completes PPE CDR at Westminster CO; design frozen for fabrication. All CDR action items tracked for closure before T-039. Source: program records.

milestone_name: HALO Critical Design Review (CDR) Complete
notes: Northrop Grumman completes HALO CDR. Review identified mass margin risks and ECLSS performance concerns. Twelve review item discrepancies (RIDs) opened; 11 closed by CDR+90 days; 1 mass-related RID tracked under T-009.

milestone_name: I-HAB Preliminary Design Review (PDR) Complete
notes: Thales Alenia Space under ESA oversight completes I-HAB PDR; JAXA ECLSS section submitted separately. Habitation volume and docking interface baselined.

milestone_name: PPE Pre-Shipment Review Complete
notes: Maxar Technologies completes PPE Pre-Shipment Review at Westminster CO. PPE cleared for transport to NGIS Gilbert AZ. All open action items dispositioned.

milestone_name: HALO Pressure Vessel Delivery to NGIS Gilbert AZ
notes: Thales Alenia Space completes HALO pressure vessel fabrication in Turin Italy and delivers module to Northrop Grumman NGIS facility in Gilbert Arizona. Major fabrication milestone. Source: TAS progress reports.

milestone_name: PPE Delivery to NGIS Gilbert AZ
notes: Maxar Technologies delivers completed PPE spacecraft to NGIS Gilbert AZ for integration with HALO. Triggers start of T-118 PPE-HALO mechanical integration.

milestone_name: I-HAB Critical Design Review (CDR) Complete
notes: Thales Alenia Space completes I-HAB CDR under ESA oversight at TAS Turin; JAXA ECLSS design confirmed. I-HAB design frozen for fabrication phase starting T-079.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Mechanical Integration Complete
notes: PPE and HALO mechanically mated at NGIS Gilbert AZ; functional interface testing of all mechanical electrical thermal and data connections begins. Major integration milestone.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Integrated System Test Complete
notes: End-to-end avionics and software integrated system test completed at NGIS; all interfaces verified including HALO-to-PPE power thermal and data links.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Acoustic and Vibration Environmental Test Complete
notes: Acoustic and vibration environmental testing completed; structural margins verified to launch loads; modal survey data correlated to analytical models.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Thermal Vacuum Environmental Test Complete
notes: Thermal vacuum test completed; thermal model correlated to test data; all subsystems verified to operate across expected cis-lunar temperature extremes.

milestone_name: ESPRIT Lunar Link Integration on HALO Complete
notes: ESPRIT Lunar Link (HALO Lunar Communication System) successfully integrated onto PPE-HALO assembly at NGIS; interface verification complete. Increases Gateway communication capability from Day 1 of launch.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Pre-Shipment Review Complete
notes: Final pre-shipment review certifies PPE-HALO-HLCS stack ready for transport to Kennedy Space Center. All open items closed. Initiates KSC launch campaign.

milestone_name: Launch Readiness Review - PPE-HALO Falcon Heavy
notes: Final major program review certifying PPE-HALO stack Falcon Heavy KSC processing and mission operations are ready to proceed to launch. Attended by all stakeholders including international partners.

milestone_name: PPE-HALO Launch on Falcon Heavy - L-Day
notes: NET April 30 2027; SpaceX Falcon Heavy Block 5 Expendable launches PPE-HALO from KSC LC-39A; Trans-Lunar Injection trajectory to NRHO. First Gateway element in space. Critical program milestone.

milestone_name: PPE AEPS 12-Month Solo Demonstration Complete
notes: PPE completes required solar electric propulsion solo demonstration verifying AEPS performance in space environment before HALO systems activated. Contractual milestone in Maxar FFP contract.

milestone_name: NRHO Insertion and Orbit Verification Complete
notes: Following approximately 7-month low-thrust transit PPE-HALO arrives in target NRHO and orbit is verified by GSFC FDF. Gateway operational in lunar orbit. Stationkeeping operations begin.

milestone_name: Gateway Initial On-Orbit Test Complete - HALO Ready for Crew
notes: Initial On-Orbit Testing (IOT) of all PPE and HALO systems complete. HALO life support pressurized. Gateway declared ready for first crewed visit. Operationally enables Artemis IV.

milestone_name: Artemis IV Launch Readiness Review Complete
notes: LRR for Artemis IV certifies SLS Block 1B Orion crew I-HAB co-manifest and Gateway receiving conditions all meet requirements to proceed with first crewed Gateway mission.

milestone_name: Artemis IV Launch - SLS Block 1B First Crewed Gateway Visit
notes: NET October 1 2028; Artemis IV launches on SLS Block 1B with Orion crew and I-HAB co-manifested payload. First crewed mission to Lunar Gateway. Major Artemis program milestone.

milestone_name: Orion First Docking at HALO - Crewed Gateway Arrival
notes: Artemis IV Orion crew docks at HALO. First humans at Lunar Gateway. Historical milestone comparable to first ISS crewed docking.

milestone_name: I-HAB Berthing and Activation Complete
notes: I-HAB separated from SLS and crew-assisted berthed to Gateway HALO docking port; activation and checkout of I-HAB systems begins including JAXA ECLSS commissioning.

milestone_name: ESPRIT Lunar View Launch
notes: ESPRIT Lunar View module launched on commercial vehicle; NET July 1 2029 per ESA schedule. Adds pressurized volume viewports xenon storage and refueling capability to Gateway.

milestone_name: ESPRIT Xenon Propellant Transfer Demonstration Complete
notes: First on-orbit xenon propellant transfer from ESPRIT Lunar View to PPE SEP tanks demonstrated successfully; validates NRHO refueling concept and extends Gateway service life.

milestone_name: Canadarm3 Delivery and Launch on Artemis V
notes: Canadarm3 large arm and small dexterous arm delivered and launched on SLS Artemis V mission. Adds critical external maintenance and element assembly robotic capability to Gateway.

milestone_name: Canadarm3 On-Orbit Commissioning Complete
notes: Canadarm3 large arm and small dexterous arm fully commissioned on-orbit; first autonomous inspection task completed; AI-enabled operations verified to required TRL in operational environment.

milestone_name: UAE Airlock Launch
notes: UAE Airlock module launched NET October 1 2030; enables extravehicular activity directly from Gateway without requiring Orion airlock utilization. First UAE hardware in deep space.

milestone_name: Gateway Full Initial Operational Capability Declaration
notes: All baseline Gateway elements integrated and operational: PPE HALO I-HAB ESPRIT Lunar Link and Lunar View Canadarm3 and UAE Airlock. Gateway declared fully operational for sustained Artemis crewed missions. Program IOC milestone.
